matrix.impact.title: Impact
matrix.impact.description: The level of influence and effect the position has on the organization.
matrix.impact.1.label: Delivery
matrix.impact.1.desc: Delivery according to specific standards and guidelines.
matrix.impact.2.label: Operation
matrix.impact.2.desc: Work achieves objectives and delivers results within a short-term, operational focus.
matrix.impact.3.label: Tactical
matrix.impact.3.desc: Specify new products, processes, standards based on organization strategy or set short- to mid-term operational strategy.
matrix.impact.4.label: Strategic
matrix.impact.4.desc: Establish and implement business strategies with a longer-term focus (typically three to five years) based on the organization's vision.
matrix.impact.5.label: Visionary
matrix.impact.5.desc: Lead an organization to develop, implement, and achieve mission, vision and values.
matrix.contribution.title: Contribution
matrix.contribution.description: The degree to which the position contributes to organizational outcomes.
matrix.contribution.1.label: Limited
matrix.contribution.1.desc: Hard to identify/discern contribution to achievement of results.
matrix.contribution.2.label: Some
matrix.contribution.2.desc: Easily discernible or measurable contribution that usually leads indirectly to achievement of results.
matrix.contribution.3.label: Direct
matrix.contribution.3.desc: Directly and clearly influences the course of action that determines the achievement of results.
matrix.contribution.4.label: Significant
matrix.contribution.4.desc: Quite marked contribution with authority of a frontline or primary nature.
matrix.contribution.5.label: Major
matrix.contribution.5.desc: Predominant authority in determining the achievement of key results.
matrix.communication.title: Communication
matrix.communication.description: The nature and complexity of communication required for the position.
matrix.communication.1.label: Transmit
matrix.communication.1.desc: Basic communication through statements or suggestions.
matrix.communication.2.label: Adapt & Exchange
matrix.communication.2.desc: Negotiating and finding compromises through flexibility.
matrix.communication.3.label: Influence
matrix.communication.3.desc: Using persuasion to promote changes or influence decisions.
matrix.communication.4.label: Negotiate
matrix.communication.4.desc: Managing complex discussions and facilitating agreements in critical situations.
matrix.communication.5.label: Long-term Negotiation
matrix.communication.5.desc: Handling strategically important communications and negotiating agreements with lasting impact.
matrix.frame.title: Frame
matrix.frame.description: The operational framework or context within which the position functions.
matrix.frame.1.label: Routine
matrix.frame.1.desc: Activities are mostly predictable and governed by established procedures.
matrix.frame.2.label: Varied
matrix.frame.2.desc: Requires choosing among diverse options, involving somewhat more complex decisions.
matrix.frame.3.label: Multifaceted
matrix.frame.3.desc: Coordinates activities of diverse nature and complexity, involving multiple variables.
matrix.frame.4.label: Diverse
matrix.frame.4.desc: Supervises complex and heterogeneous activities spanning different functions and areas of the organization.
matrix.innovation.title: Innovation
matrix.innovation.description: The level of innovation or creative thinking required by the position.
matrix.innovation.1.label: Procedural
matrix.innovation.2.label: Improvement
matrix.innovation.2.desc: Seeks to improve existing processes without radically altering the method.
matrix.innovation.3.label: Creation
matrix.innovation.3.desc: Designs new methods or strategies to achieve strategic objectives.
matrix.innovation.4.label: Pioneer
matrix.innovation.4.desc: Leads revolutionary or unprecedented initiatives in the industry, marking a significant transformation.
matrix.innovation.5.label: Breakthrough
matrix.innovation.5.desc: Creates revolutionary approaches with industry-wide impact.
matrix.innovation.6.label: Transformative
matrix.innovation.6.desc: Introduces completely new paradigms that fundamentally change the field.
matrix.complexity.title: Complexity
matrix.complexity.description: The level of complexity in decision-making and problem-solving required by the position.
matrix.complexity.1.label: Simple
matrix.complexity.1.desc: Requires basic judgments with few available options.
matrix.complexity.2.label: Moderately Complex
matrix.complexity.2.desc: Must consider multiple options and make evaluations with a certain degree of judgment.
matrix.complexity.3.label: Highly Complex
matrix.complexity.3.desc: Decision-making involves consideration of numerous variables and a high level of ambiguity.
matrix.complexity.4.label: Extremely Complex
matrix.complexity.4.desc: Faces critical decisions with uncertainty and very high impact, requiring deep analysis.
matrix.knowledge.title: Knowledge
matrix.knowledge.description: The depth and breadth of knowledge required for the position.
matrix.knowledge.1.label: Limited
matrix.knowledge.1.desc: Based on routines or basic knowledge.
matrix.knowledge.2.label: Basic
matrix.knowledge.2.desc: Requires specialized knowledge in a specific area.
matrix.knowledge.3.label: Broad
matrix.knowledge.3.desc: Needs a broad understanding of general theories or principles.
matrix.knowledge.4.label: Expert
matrix.knowledge.4.desc: Possesses an advanced and integrated understanding in a specific field.
matrix.knowledge.5.label: Professional Standard
matrix.knowledge.5.desc: Achieves a level of mastery comparable to a recognized professional.
matrix.knowledge.6.label: Organizational Specialist
matrix.knowledge.6.desc: Has deep and specific experience within the organization.
matrix.knowledge.7.label: Preeminence
matrix.knowledge.7.desc: Has substantial experience that transcends functional areas.
matrix.knowledge.8.label: Extensive
matrix.knowledge.8.desc: Possesses significant and multifaceted experience spanning multiple knowledge areas.
matrix.teams.title: Teams
matrix.teams.description: The level of team collaboration and leadership required by the position.
matrix.teams.1.label: Individual Contributor
matrix.teams.1.desc: The role is performed autonomously without depending on direct collaboration.
matrix.teams.2.label: Team Member
matrix.teams.2.desc: Regularly collaborates with others to achieve common objectives.
matrix.teams.3.label: Team Leader
matrix.teams.3.desc: Takes responsibility for directing and coordinating a work group to achieve collective goals.
matrix.breadth.title: Breadth
matrix.breadth.description: The scope of responsibilities encompassed by the position.
matrix.breadth.1.label: Narrow
matrix.breadth.1.desc: Functions are very specific and delimited.
matrix.breadth.1.5.label: Somewhat Narrow
matrix.breadth.1.5.desc: Functions are mostly specific with limited scope.
matrix.breadth.2.label: Moderate
matrix.breadth.2.desc: Handles responsibilities of intermediate scope, with some diversity of tasks.
matrix.breadth.2.5.label: Somewhat Broad
matrix.breadth.3.label: Broad
matrix.breadth.3.desc: Manages a wide range of activities spanning multiple disciplines and functional areas.
matrix.risk.title: Risk
matrix.risk.description: The level of risk associated with the position's decision-making authority.
matrix.risk.0.label: None
matrix.risk.1.label: Low
matrix.risk.1.5.label: Low-Medium
matrix.risk.2.label: Medium
matrix.risk.2.5.label: Medium-High
matrix.risk.3.label: High
matrix.risk.3.desc: High risk with critical consequences for the organization.
matrix.environment.title: Environment
matrix.environment.description: The operational environment or context complexity in which the position functions.
matrix.environment.1.label: Simple
matrix.environment.1.5.label: Somewhat Simple
matrix.environment.2.label: Moderate
matrix.environment.2.desc: Mixed environment with both simple and complex elements.
matrix.environment.2.5.label: Somewhat Complex
matrix.environment.2.5.desc: Environment with significant complexity and ambiguity.
matrix.environment.3.label: Complexo
matrix.environment.3.desc: Ambiente altamente complexo com ambiguidade substancial e condições de mudança.
evaluation.process_desc: O processo de avaliação analítica de cargos segue estas etapas:
evaluation.impact_contribution_desc: Impacto e Contribuição: Determinação do valor e nível de influência.
evaluation.communication_frame_desc: Comunicação e Estrutura: Natureza da interação e contexto operacional.
evaluation.innovation_complexity_desc: Inovação e Complexidade: Requisitos de pensamento e resolução de problemas.
evaluation.knowledge_teams_breadth_desc: Conhecimento, Equipos e abrangência: Especialização, colaboração e escopo.
evaluation.risk_environment_desc: Risco e Ambiente: Responsabilidade e complexidade de contexto.
evaluation.process_footer: Complete todas as dimensões para receber uma classificação final.
matrix.size.title: Tamanho
matrix.size.description: O escopo organizacional ou escala relevante para a posição.
